title: ゴーゴー！ヤングのお部屋☆

text_block_list.name: Swanky Girl
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! It's time for another Cool Cat's Den! ♪
Is everyone ready to catch some disco fever?

text_block_list.name: Cool Cat in Training
text_block_list.text:
I-in this segment, our extra-cool viewers send in
their worries, and we'll solve them lickety-split!
Our first guest today is this hip and hoppin' gal!

text_block_list.name: Passerby M
text_block_list.text: Hello. I'm just passing by. Please call me M.

text_block_list.name: Cool Cat in Training
text_block_list.text:
Um... Aren't you McQueen? What could you be
worried—

text_block_list.name: Passerby M
text_block_list.text: It's M, for one. And as for my worries, well... I simply cannot resist a delicious dessert!

text_block_list.name: Passerby M
text_block_list.text:
A Meji—er, an Umamusume from an esteemed
family must always maintain peak physical
condition. However...

text_block_list.name: Passerby M
text_block_list.text: Sometimes, I give in to temptation and my body weight increases by a small—and I mean a miniscule—amount!

text_block_list.name: Swanky Girl
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm picking up what you're putting down!
What you need is some nata de coco!

text_block_list.name: Passerby M
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Swanky Girl
text_block_list.text:
Nata de coco is made up of ninety-nine percent
water and one percent fiber! It's a light, sweet
treat that's totally healthy and low on calories! ♪

text_block_list.name: Swanky Girl
text_block_list.text:
It helps burn fat and detoxes your body, so it's
great for those times you wanna cut back!

text_block_list.name: Passerby M
text_block_list.text:
Can I really believe such a miraculous food
actually exists?

text_block_list.name: Swanky Girl
text_block_list.text:
Of course you can! And don't hold back either. I
won't have you getting all sicky-icky on us...

text_block_list.name: Passerby M
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you, Swanky Girl!

text_block_list.name: Cool Cat in Training
text_block_list.text:
What a super cool solution to a sticky sweet
situation! For our next guest, we have...

text_block_list.name: Incognito Idol F
text_block_list.text:
Heya! I'm Incognito Idol F! ♪ And my running
style of choice is front running!

text_block_list.name: Cool Cat in Training
text_block_list.text: So, Falc—I mean, F... What's on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Incognito Idol F
text_block_list.text: Well, Falco can't make up her mind about the choreography for her new single. What we have is okay, but it's missing something...

text_block_list.name: Cool Cat in Training
text_block_list.text: (She's making her identity so obvious...)

text_block_list.name: Cool Cat in Training
text_block_list.text: Um... Swanky Girl! Give us some tips!

text_block_list.name: Swanky Girl
text_block_list.text: I got it... You want to shake things up, right?!

text_block_list.name: Swanky Girl
text_block_list.text:
I'll teach you the trendiest dance, fresh off the
disco floor! A bit of my swanky flair and you'll
have a super-cool routine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Incognito Idol F
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's so retro but so fresh at the same
time—how unique! ♪

text_block_list.name: Incognito Idol F
text_block_list.text:
Oh! This new single is a cheer song... so maybe
waving around something like this fan-shaped
pom-pom would be good!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Great job today. You were amazing yet again,
Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to start eating nata de coco and disco
dancing too. Hopefully that'll make me an even
cooler cat! Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...You're so sweet to think that, Chiyo. Sweet as
panna cotta, but naive all the same!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
To be hip and with it, nata de coco and disco
dancing alone won't do... There's padded
shoulders, the preppy sweater around your neck,
plus so many other things!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be your guide! ♪ So strap in—a wonderful,
bubbly world awaits!
